title: ManePear's "Rarest" Armor
description: Adds the special armor from ManePear's recent video!
body:
# If you need support, please create a post in my discord with your issue!
Adds the special armor from one of ManePear's videos: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/a8FciLdbkXA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**For other versions, get the plugin here: [https://modrinth.com/plugin/godarmor](https://modrinth.com/plugin/godarmor) (Made by duckiee2)**

## Features:
- Helmet: Increased break speed, break any block easily
- Chestplate: Increased attack speed, can swing your axe like a sword
- Leggings: Increased walk speed, equivalent to speed II
- Boots: Increased health, grants 20 hearts
## Obtainment:
The armor is supposed to by obtained in a way chosen by server admins. There is no set way to obtain it yet.
### Command to obtain as an admin: /function godarmor:give/armor
